title: Usopp Challenges Luffy
description: The duel ends with Usopp leaving the crew and the Going Merry becoming a symbol of a broken bond.
scene: Across pages 17, 19, 21, 24, this part follows Luffy, Iceburg, Usopp, Zoro, Sanji. The duel ends with Usopp leaving the crew and the Going Merry becoming a symbol of a broken bond.
summary: The duel ends with Usopp leaving the crew and the Going Merry becoming a symbol of a broken bond.
